_comment: Real on-chain Uniswap transactions sampled from Ethereum mainnet via Dune (query 7551293, ethereum.transactions, block_date >= 2026-04-01, 3 most-recent tx per (router,selector)). Every entry is a real tx — tx_hash + explorer_url trace to the on-chain source. Consumed by tests/uniswap_real_tx.rs to verify the declarative (Tier A) routing path L0~L4. expect: 'pass' = router/decode/map/lower should all succeed; 'excluded' = declarative MISS is the correct result (function intentionally out of Phase 7B scope per AUDIT_UNISWAP_PHASE7B.md).

transactions.intent: PoolManager.unlock(bytes) — flash-accounting callback entry, not a user permission grant (out of scope per plan §5.2)
Permit2.lockdown(TokenSpenderPair[]) — revokes allowances, safety direction (out of scope per AUDIT_UNISWAP_PHASE7B.md §2.3)
Permit2.invalidateNonces(address,address,uint48) — nonce invalidation, safety direction (out of scope per AUDIT_UNISWAP_PHASE7B.md §2.3)
exactInputSingle (L2 Base spot-check — per-chain SwapRouter02 address)
swapExactTokensForTokens (L2 Base spot-check — per-chain V2 Router02 address)
execute(bytes,bytes[],uint256) (L2 Base spot-check — per-chain UR address)
swapExactTokensForTokens (L2 Arbitrum spot-check — per-chain V2 Router02 address)
exactInputSingle (L2 Arbitrum spot-check — per-chain SwapRouter02 address)
mint (L2 Arbitrum spot-check — per-chain NFPM address)
